home_title: The TanStack starter now routes through feature-sliced page boundaries.
home_description: Route files stay inside src/routes as framework adapters, while view ownership lives in src/pages and shared building blocks live in src/shared.
home_dashboard_description: Thin folder-based route entry backed by a page slice.
home_organization_description: Dynamic folder route using TanStack's $param naming.
dashboard_description: This page exists mainly to prove the folder-per-route TanStack Router convention. The route file is a thin adapter and the page UI lives in the pages layer.
organization_description: This dynamic folder route demonstrates TanStack Router path params while keeping domain persistence decisions out of the first database setup pass.
